pattern: Each decrement lowers the total by one, so the cheapest way to reach a multiple of k is to shave off exactly the current remainder.
hints: Every operation reduces the array sum by exactly one. What target sum is closest below the current one and divisible by k?
You only care about the sum modulo k, since decrements can be applied freely to any element.
The answer is the total sum taken modulo k.

edge_inputs.description: sum exactly one over a multiple

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, size))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 1000) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(1, 100)
    return [nums, k]
